login.title: Welcome Back
login.description: Sign in to your Vibe Lab account

recoveryCard.title: Forgot your username or password?
recoveryCard.description: You can register a new account for this device. In this single-user setup, that replaces the existing login.

login.backToLoginDescription: Go back to the sign-in form if you want to use your existing account.

register.title: Register New Account
register.description: Create a fresh account for this device when you can no longer access the previous login.
register.recoveryWarning: This replaces the existing single-user account on this device.

errors.usernameLength: Username must be at least 3 characters long
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long

logout.title: Sign Out
logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
